content.en:
This Eternal Compression Secret Technique is a Roulette Secret Technique, which uses its own innate eternal rules into a regular roulette, and when it is in the regular roulette, it begins to compress the half-step eternal power in the body.

After obtaining the Roulette Secret Technique, Ye Tian spent a considerable period of time in the Maple Leaf Territory to practice the Roulette Secret Technique.

As time passed, the half-step eternal power in Ye Tian's body became more and more powerful and pure, and more half-step eternal power could naturally be fused in his body

Therefore, his cultivation did not seem to have changed, but the half-step eternal power contained in it was much more, and the power was even stronger, and his strength naturally increased rapidly.

It is not difficult to compress the half-step eternal power by five times, but after compressing it by five times, it is a little difficult to continue compressing it.

After many years of tribulation, Ye Tian still managed to compress five times and a half step of eternal power.

His half-step eternal power was already very powerful, so it was compressed by five times, and the increase in strength was still very large.

At this moment, Ye Tian felt that his strength had roughly reached the top of the Seven Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm combat power, which was not very far from the first boundary barrier.

After that, Ye Tian inquired how he could improve his will or compress his half-step eternal power.

Soon, he really inquired.

Among the many space-time territories, there are still many treasures that are comparable to or beyond the Riftwind Valley, and entering those places can slowly improve your will.

As for how to quickly compress one's half-step eternal power, except for a few resources that can assist in compressing one's half-step eternal power, you can only rely on the secret technique of eternal compression.

This is also the reason why the top-notch Eternal Compression Secret Technique is extremely precious, if Ye Tian obtains the Eternal Compression Secret Technique that can compress 100 times, then he can easily compress ten times the half-step Eternal Power, and even spend some time to compress it to 20 times.

But the Eternal Compression Secret Technique like the Roulette Secret Technique is far from being able to do so.

"The top-notch Eternal Compression Secret Technique, if you don't join some Eternal Realm forces, you won't be able to get it at all. And those Eternal Realms will not help the half-step Eternal Realm for no reason, unless they become their servants and fight their factions, it will be difficult to gain benefits."

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He prepares to create his own Eternal Compression Secret Technique.

After all, the Eternal Compression Secret Technique was also created by others, and those top-notch Eternal Compression Secret Techniques came from those powerful Eternal Realms.

Since those eternal realms can be created, he can also create them.

He can use his copy body to try again and again, and countless attempts will always create an effective eternal compression secret technique.

And this method is only something he can do, and the other half-step eternal realms can't imitate it, unless it's death. So.

Ye Tian's doppelganger annihilated itself, condensed from the ontology, and began to try to create the Eternal Compression Secret Technique again and again in the Source Sea.

Of course, Ye Tian still acquired a large number of Eternal Compression Secret Techniques.Even if it was a very rubbish Eternal Compression Secret Technique, he also acquired some わ夨.With so many Eternal Compression Secret Techniques as a reference, B naturally had a better chance of successfully creating a top-notch Eternal Compression Secret Technique. then

At the same time, Ye Tian's body went to the treasure land - True Meaning Mountain!

The location of Zhenyi 1 Mountain is located in the Shaoyang Territory, and the Shaoyang Territory is occupied by the half-step Eternal Realm of the top Eight Extremes Realm, although the other party is not a lord and cannot completely control the territory, but his own strength is not weaker than a weaker Eternal Realm, so he is qualified to occupy the Shaoyang Territory.

And the True Meaning Mountain was naturally occupied by the Eight-Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, but the other party also knew very well that he could not completely occupy this treasure land, so he openly faced the other half-step Eternal Realms, and any half-step Eternal Realm could enter the True Meaning Mountain to practice.

Of course.

If you want to enter the True Meaning Mountain, you still have to pay some resources, and not all of these resources fall into the hands of the eight-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm, and you have to be divided by the lord alliance for more than half.

Otherwise, without the recognition and protection of the Alliance of Lords, other Eternal Realms would definitely steal this treasure land.

Soon.

Ye Tian passed through the space-time teleportation array of the Maple Leaf Territory, and teleported several times on the way, and then came to the Shaoyang Territory.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the True Yi Mountain in Shaoyang's territory.

A large array was arranged here by the owner of the Shaoyang Territory, the True Yang Holy Ancestor, and many half-step Eternal Realm guards were also dispatched, one of whom was still the Seven-Pole Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, and even touched the first boundary barrier, and was the first powerhouse of the True Yang Holy Ancestor.

Therefore, no one dared to be presumptuous here, even if there was an Eternal Realm who wanted to come here to cultivate, he had to give face to the True Yang Holy Ancestor.

"If you pay 200,000 space-time coins, you can enter it to cultivate, and the time limit is an eternal year!"

The half-step Eternal Realm guarding here stopped Ye Tian and said.

Ye Tian took out 200,000 space-time coins and entered the True Meaning Mountain.

As soon as he entered the True Meaning Mountain, he immediately sensed a will attacking, this will seemed to be suppressing his will all the time, which was different from the will impact in the Rift Valley, but it was generally for the purpose of refining the will.

Moreover, the will boost here has a good effect, and even has some effect on the Eternal Realm.

Officially, Ye Tian will come here to cultivate.

Although he didn't come here from the main body, the will to copy the body was improved, and the will of the main body would also be improved.

So, there is no difference between an ontological body and a replicating body.

Ye Tian walked step by step to the depths of the True Meaning Mountain, and soon attracted the attention of the other half-step Eternal Realms of the True Meaning Mountain, when Ye Tian surpassed the position of some of the Seven Extreme Realms and the half-step Eternal Realm, and came to the top of the True Meaning Mountain, even the True Yang Holy Ancestor was shocked.

Somewhere in the territory of Shaoyang.

True Yang Saint Ancestor's gaze passed through the layers of void and looked at Ye Tian at the top of True Meaning Mountain.

"Eternity?

"No, this person is not the Eternal Realm, but only the Seven Extremes (Dede Zhao) Realm, but the Seven Extremes Realm can't come to the top of the True Meaning Mountain at all, it is a position that only the Eternal Realm can reach, if the half-step Eternal Realm dares to cultivate there, the will will will be shattered, and it will fall directly∪"

The True Yang Saint Ancestor was surprised.

He quickly guessed the reason why Ye Tian was able to enter the top of True Meaning Mountain, that is, Ye Tian's will broke the boundary of will and stepped into the second order of eternal will, which was comparable to the level of will of ordinary eternal realm.

"The second order is the Eternal Will, and the Eternal Will helps to break the first boundary barrier, this person has not yet reached the first boundary barrier, if it is broken, he has at least eighty percent hope of breaking the shackles, if the half-step Eternal Power continues to compress some multiples, he has one hundred percent hope of breaking through to the eight-step Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm level. "

"This son is qualified for me to befriend!"

True Yang Saint Ancestor said with a smile

No, he didn't go to see Ye Tian immediately, and when Ye Tian's retreat was over, it would not be too late for him to see Ye Tian again
